choices: Sequencer, driver, and monitor around one interface
items.explain: One agent ≈ one protocol interface with drive/observe paths.

items.prompt: An active agent differs from passive because it…
choices: Includes sequencer and driver to stimulate the DUT
items.explain: Active = drive + observe; passive = observe only.

items.prompt: The monitor’s job is best described as…
choices: Sample the interface and publish transactions
items.explain: Monitor observes and sends analysis transactions downstream.

items.prompt: A passive agent still includes a monitor.
items.explain: Passive drops the drive path, not observation.
